reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_122]]
Speaker 3: All right, understood.

[[BLOCK:srt_123]]
Speaker 3: So how does Global and Online Education ensure that its courses remain internationally competitive while also addressing the real career development needs of Chinese students?

[[BLOCK:srt_124]]
Speaker 1: That’s an excellent question. I’d like to invite our Chief Academic Officer, who oversees the entire curriculum system, to respond.

[[BLOCK:srt_125]]
Speaker 2: Let me explain how we approach this.

[[BLOCK:srt_126]]
Speaker 2: First, we rigorously vet our faculty. Whether they teach in the United States or abroad, every instructor undergoes a thorough evaluation process.

[[BLOCK:srt_127]]
Speaker 2: Each of them is a recognized leader in their respective professional field.

[[BLOCK:srt_128]]
Speaker 2: Building on that foundation, we align their academic expertise closely with current market demands.

[[BLOCK:srt_129]]
Speaker 2: In this way, we develop high-quality programs designed to have a lasting impact on our students’ career growth.

[[BLOCK:srt_130]]
Speaker 2: At the same time, we continuously assess and refine each program.

[[BLOCK:srt_131]]
Speaker 2: We have established a comprehensive feedback system to consistently gather students’ opinions and suggestions.

[[BLOCK:srt_132]]
Speaker 2: Are the courses truly meeting their needs?

[[BLOCK:srt_133]]
Speaker 2: And does the quality of the program live up to their expectations?
